g.text: Non-Functional Tests — Different Question, Different Probe
Six probes, six distinct visual shapes. Each asks a question the functional test pyramid cannot answer.
Anchor: knee at ~5k RPS, p99 climbs 50ms → 800ms
Anchor: 1 pod killed → traffic reroutes in 3s
WAF blocks 998 — the 2 that reach app → bug tickets.
Anchor: 18 focusable elements; 3 unreachable by keyboard
axe flags it; keyboard users never reach it.
